prestazioni: SR20DE (2.0L NA) or SR20DET (2.0L Turbo) engine swap with a forged internals build: JE 87mm forged pistons (9.0:1 CR for NA, 8.5:1 for turbo), Eagle H-beam connecting rods, ACL Race Series bearings, and a Tomei 264°/260° camshaft kit with adjustable vernier pulleys for precise valve timing. Forced induction (SR20DET) requires a Garrett GT2860RS turbocharger with a 0.64 A/R turbine housing, custom 3-inch stainless steel downpipe, and a GReddy Type-S intercooler (core dimensions: 24x6x3.5 inches) to handle 1.2 bar of boost reliably.

Full bolt-on drivetrain reinforcement: OS Giken Super Lock LSD (2-way for track, 1.5-way for street), Nismo 5-speed close-ratio gearbox (ratios: 3.321, 2.077, 1.308, 1.000, 0.793) with a Nismo 240mm twin-plate clutch, and a custom 4.111 final drive ratio for optimal acceleration. Upgraded axles with Nismo CV joints and polyurethane differential mounts to eliminate drivetrain slop.

Suspension and chassis tuning: Ohlins Road & Track DFV coilovers (front: 400lb/in, rear: 350lb/in) with 24-way adjustable damping, poly bushings (SuperPro) for all control arms and subframe, and a Cusco 2-point strut brace (P11-specific) to reduce chassis flex. Braking system upgraded to Endless CC-R6 rotors (front: 320mm, rear: 280mm) with 4-piston calipers (front) and 2-piston calipers (rear), paired with Ferodo DS2500 pads and braided stainless steel lines for consistent pedal feel.
estetica: Rocket Bunny P11 widebody kit (Version 2) with extended fenders (30mm front, 40mm rear), custom carbon fiber front splitter, and a ducktail spoiler (20mm height) for balanced aero. Full seam-welded chassis and seam-sealed underbody for rigidity and weight reduction (approx. 15kg saved).

Custom 17x9.5 ET15 (front) and 17x10.5 ET20 (rear) Work Meister S1 3P wheels (15.5kg each) with 225/45/17 (front) and 255/40/17 (rear) Yokohama Advan A052 tires (R-compound) for track-focused grip. Wheel spacers (15mm front, 20mm rear) to fill the arches without rubbing.

Full interior overhaul: Bride Zeta III bucket seats (SRD-specific mounts) with Takata 4-point harnesses, custom carbon fiber dashboard overlay (P11-specific), and a Nardi Classic 350mm steering wheel with a NRG quick-release hub. Engine bay dressed with a custom aluminum radiator support, carbon fiber intake piping (HKS Hi-Power), and a relocated battery (Optima RedTop) to the trunk for weight distribution (55:45 front-to-rear).
